title: Six people spotted 4 star-like UFOs flying slowly in Curitiba [1998]
excerpt: DEC 12th, 1998. Time: 09h00 pm. Duration: 30 minutes. In Curitiba, State of Paraná, six (6) people spotted four (4) unidentified flying objects in the Boqueirão neighborhood. According to the witnesses, there were 4 round UFOs: 3 were white and 1 was red. The four objects had the appearance of stars being observed in the […]
text_preview: DEC 12th, 1998. Time: 09h00 pm. Duration: 30 minutes. In Curitiba, State of Paraná, six (6) people spotted four (4) unidentified flying objects in the Boqueirão neighborhood. According to the witnesses, there were 4 round UFOs: 3 were white and 1 was red. The four objects had the appearance of stars being observed in the firmament and flew slowly. At the beginning of the sighting, the UFOs were 1 km close to the observers, then they moved further away. At first, the objects remained stationary, then they began to perform circular movements and, in the end, they all moved like “shooting stars”,
summary: Six witnesses in Boqueirão, Curitiba-PR observed four round UFOs (three white, one red) performing slow circular movements for 30 minutes before departing like shooting stars.
